en: And the Bad Place made some modifications. We got you your favorite beer.
ko: 네, 그리고 나쁜 곳에서 몇 가지 수정을 했어. 네가 가장 좋아하는 맥주를 가져왔어.

en: Yeah, but it's always warm. On your jukebox, you'll find every song ever sung.
Yeah, by the Eagles, and it's only the live versions.
Also, there's some spoken word poetry from William Shatner.
ko: 또한 윌리엄 샤트너의 낭독 시도 있어.

en: It's deeply terrible. You get the idea.
Welcome to eternal mediocrity. Welcome to the Medium Place.
So what's up? What's your deal? Are you single? What's going on?
Sorry about before. One of the perks of living alone is that I get to just walk around naked.
My kind of gal. And I gotta say, you keep it tight.
Oh, that is the nicest and only thing anyone has said to me in 30 years.
ko: 오, 그건 30년 동안 누군가가 나에게 한 가장 친절한 말이야.

en: So tell us everything. I mean, what did you do to end up here?
That's kind of a long story. Gonna need a drink or three.
Definitely my kind of gal. You guys have fun. This is me and Janet's honeymoon,
ko: 확실히 내 스타일이야. 너희들 재밌게 놀아.

en: so we're gonna go try and figure out how to have sex.
ko: 그래서 우리는 섹스를 하는 방법을 알아보려고 해.

en: So I was a hotshot corporate lawyer in the 1980s.
ko: 나는 1980년대에 유명한 기업 변호사였어. 나는 오직-
